name: Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter
title: Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDSetParameter( char paramName[], float paramValue ); // form 1
description: Changes an internal parameter of the PDD API.

parameters.name: debug
parameters.description: activates debug outputs in the Write Window 1: on 0: off

parameters.name: autoUpdateVariable
parameters.description: process variable is updated if value command is received 1: auto update 0: process variable have to be updated manually by Iso11783IL_PDDSetValue e.g. in callback function Iso11783IL_PDDOnDataChanged

parameters.name: Note Using version the version value obtained from the database (node attribute ISO11783PDDVersion) is overwritten.
